name: broker-claim-audit
description: Engineer-audit broker marketing claims (spreads, leverage, regulation) — no advice

steps.text: Treat the site as sales copy. Guilty of marketing until primary registers verify.

steps.goal: Using skill broker-claim-audit and any user-pasted site text about a broker (e.g. EC Markets NZ homepage), produce a claim audit. Do not invent licence numbers. Flag missing evidence. Not financial advice.
criteria: Verdict label correct (Insufficient evidence / Marketing only / Partially verified / Red flags)
Key claims listed with evidence status
Account/leverage inconsistencies called out if present
Next verification steps name specific primary sources
One concrete risk of trusting the page as-is
No recommendation to open an account as 'safe'
